tool_calls:
command -v jq || true
command -v mlr || true
command -v csvjson || true

jq -Rn '
  (input | fromcsv) as $keys
  | [inputs
      | select(length > 0)
      | fromcsv as $row
      | reduce range(0; $keys|length) as $i ({}; . + {($keys[$i]): $row[$i]})
    ]
' < /data/users.csv

jq -Rn '
  (input | split(",")) as $keys
  | [inputs
      | select(length > 0)
      | split(",") as $row
      | reduce range(0; $keys|length) as $i ({}; . + {($keys[$i]): $row[$i]})
    ]
' < /data/users.csv

jq --version
jq -n '1'
printf 'a
b
' | jq -R .
printf 'a
b
' | jq -Rn '[inputs]'
printf 'a
b
' | jq -nR '[inputs]'
awk -F',' 'NR==1{print "header"; next} {print "NR",NR,"count",count+0; if(count==0) printf "["; else printf ","; count++} END{print "\nend",count+0}' /data/users.csv
